name: @jmcombs/pi-prompt-enhancer
description_en: Codebase-aware prompt enhancer for the Pi coding agent — rewrites rough prompts into precise ones, with project tree, git context, and referenced file contents, before they reach the model.
description_zh: Pi coding agent 的代码库感知提示增强器 — 将粗略提示重写为精确提示，包含项目树、git 上下文和引用文件内容，在提示到达模型之前进行处理。
